DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-27-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JOHN KIM'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Jordanna G. Thigpen and Bryan M. Payne of Cotchett Pitre & McCarthy, LLP (650.697.6000) for plaintiffs and responding parties; Ali Ari Aalaei of Ari Law, PC (357.3600) for defendant and moving party.
Argued and the court modified its ruling as follows: overruled. Plaintiff has sufficiently pled all causes of action with required particularity. On agreement of the parties, defendant must file its answer by July 15, 2011. One order encompassing the three demurrers signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Notice Of Motion And Otion For Order Requiring Pltf To Post Bond;
Off Calendar Mar-08-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT LEADMARKET INC.'S MOTION FOR ORDER REQUIRING PLAINTIFF TO POST BOND (CAL CORP. CODE SECTION 800(c)).

APPEARANCES: Samer Danfoura, Esq. of Danfoura Law Offices 970-8012 for pltf & opposing party; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - MOTION FOR ORDER REQUIRING PLAINTIFF TO POST BOND IS DENIED. THE SUIT IS NOT DERIVATIVE IN NATURE AND PLAINTIFF IS NOT SEEKING TO RECOVER ON BEHALF OF THE CORPORATION. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
